title: settings.dataset — chart series styling (AFB-only; not part of afb.execution.v1 wire)
description: Freeform per-series style config (color/style/panel triplets, e.g. positions.longColor, trades.tradesBColor, hhi.hhiAgressiveBuyColor). Keys vary per series and grow as new series/indicators are added — deliberately left as open string/number maps rather than enumerating every *Color/*Style/*Panel key (dozens per section, purely presentational, not consumed structurally by any code path).
